overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character moves from a covered walkway under an overpass, along neon-lit streets with futuristic vehicles, and through pedestrian plazas with distinctive cyberpunk architecture and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath orange metal overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the overpass, passing by graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking past the camera

entered.detail: large wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large curved orange metal structure forming the roof of the walkway
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive orange metal overpass. The left wall is covered in colorful graffiti, while digital billboards illuminate the scene from above. The concrete walkway is wet and reflective, and occasional pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with large digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open night air, revealing the city skyline
turns right to walk alongside the multi-lane street with traffic

agents.ego_description: exits the covered walkway and turns right to follow the street, passing by palm trees and billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving down the street

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboard displaying 'WILD BLUE' advertisement with purple and orange frame
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into the open night air of a bustling commercial street. Turning right, they walk alongside a multi-lane road where futuristic vehicles pass by. A massive curved 'WILD BLUE' digital billboard dominates the right side of the view, while palm trees line the left sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with heavy advertising

events.description: futuristic sports car and truck pass by on the right side of the street
approaching intersection with distinctive green glass building becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the passing traffic and neon signs

entered.detail: futuristic building with curved green glass facade and arched structure
modern multi-story building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit boulevard, the character passes by the massive WILD BLUE billboard as futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The street is lined with modern glass buildings and palm trees. In the distance, a distinctive green glass building with an arched structure becomes visible as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crossing and plaza entrance

events.description: crosses the multi-lane street at the yellow-striped crosswalk
enters the pedestrian plaza area with modern sculptures and descending walkways

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and entering the plaza area with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink shirt crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: tall grey concrete office building with multiple windows
descending concrete walkway leading to lower plaza level
modern architectural structure with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the busy intersection at the yellow-striped crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians including a person in a bright pink shirt. After crossing, they enter a modern plaza area with a descending walkway. The green glass building is now on the left, while a grey office building stands on the right, and purple neon lights illuminate the lower plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian plaza with modern art installations

events.description: descends into the lower plaza level with reflective wet concrete

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower plaza area, passing by modern sculptures and other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall futuristic sculpture with blue and white illumination
single large tree growing in the concrete plaza
industrial building with scaffolding and construction elements

segments.scene_description: The character descends into the lower plaza level, where the concrete surfaces are wet and reflective. A modern illuminated sculpture and a large tree dominate the center of the plaza, while futuristic buildings rise in the background. The area is sparsely populated with pedestrians walking in various directions, and construction scaffolding is visible on a building to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city plaza. It begins beneath a massive orange metal overpass, moving along a wet, graffiti-covered walkway illuminated by overhead digital billboards. As the camera emerges into the open night air, the scene expands into a bustling commercial boulevard where the view is dominated by a curved WILD BLUE billboard and palm trees lining the road. The movement continues across a yellow-striped intersection filled with pedestrians, shifting from the open street toward a modern plaza flanked by a distinctive green glass building and a grey office tower. Finally, the camera descends into a lower plaza level, where purple neon lights reflect off wet concrete surfaces surrounding a central illuminated sculpture and a large tree.
